metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.description: A list of Template Positions to be created
text.title: Template Positions Payload

text_1.description: Create Template Positions as Copy or as Import from Template
text_1.title: Operation Type

text_2.description: The GUID of the Template where the Positions are added to
text_2.title: Template

Filter_Positions_by_Project_Product_[wit.description: Get all Positions of Type 'Project Product' where no BOM is assigned. Project Product Positions with BOM are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Positions_by_BOM_Project_Product.description: Get all Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Exclude Positions from Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Positions_by_Project_Product_[wit.description: Get all Positions of Type 'Project Product' where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Remove_Project_Products_from_Positions.description: Remove all Positions of Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Remove_BOM_Project_Products_from_Positio.description: Remove all Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Set_varTemplateDetails_Payload.description: Add all Positions to Payload without replacing any Project Product GUID.

Filter_Template_Details_by_Element_Type.description: Only process positions that are not Bill of Materials. These positions are already created in the previous step.

select.hso_templatedetail_parentid@odata.bind:
@If(
	equals(
        item()?['hso_level'],
        1
    ), 
	'',
	concat(
		'hso_templatedetails(_hso_templateid_value=', 
		item()?['_hso_templateid_value'],
		',hso_linenumber=',
        concat(
			'''', 
			item()?['hso_parent_linenumber_import'], 
			''''
		),
		')'
	)
)

parameters.request/url: https://@{parameters('EnvVar | Dataverse Instance (hso_EnvVarDataverseInstance)')}/api/data/v9.2/hso_projectproducts?$filter=hso_name eq '@{encodeUriComponent(body('FETCH_BOM_Project_Product')?['hso_name'])}' and _hso_templateid_value eq @{triggerBody()?['text_2']}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_BOM'))} Bill of Materials Project Products to process. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_BOM'))} Bill of Materials Project Products processed. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

Project_Products.description: Check whether Project Products need to be created

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Respond with Success to Navigation App and proceed with subsequent Tasks. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value:
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Respond with Failure to Navigation App and proceed with subsequent Tasks.
Error Message: @{variables('varErrorMessage')} @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required Parameters have been added to the Calculation.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Parameters may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log for further details.
